name: Kieran - BL
description:
In the 1890s, times were changing, and fast. The age of outlaws and bandits were coming to an end, and it was hard to maintain such a life. Open country became populated by buildings and power poles, and infamous outlaws were being caught and hanged one by one.

Kieran and the rest of his gang, the dysfunctional found family they were, were seemingly next on the gallows. They were falling apart, people were dying - or leaving - and it was all coming to a close. Kieran had one person left that he knew would stay in his life and welcome him back with open arms.
